title: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure
description: This center governs inspiration & mental pressure. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
topic: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure
learningGoal: The viewer understands what the Head center governs, and what it means for them when it is defined versus open — and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: This center governs inspiration & mental pressure.
When defined: You have a consistent source of questions, inspiration, and mental pressure. You know what's worth thinking about.
When open: You amplify others' inspiration and can feel overwhelmed by mental pressure that isn't yours. Not every question needs YOUR answer.
forbiddenClaims: a defined center is better, stronger, or more evolved than an open center
open centers are flaws or weaknesses to fix
you can or should change which of your centers are defined

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: The Head Center — Inspiration & Mental Pressure — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: This center governs inspiration & mental pressure. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
